node_data.name: Royal Ontario Museum
node_data.description: World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history. Indoor cultural experience with dinosaurs, gems, and world cultures exhibits.

node_data.name: Art Gallery of Ontario
node_data.description: World-class art museum with Canadian and international collections. Indoor cultural experience in Frank Gehry-designed building. Quiet and contemplative atmosphere.
